# libevent benchmark run
# exp=EXP-001 host=redis-benchmark-coordinator-c4.c.redislabs-cto.internal timestamp=20260601-001551

# cores=2-5 repetitions=15 warmup=1
# libevent=libevent (1b7cc9b5)  commit=1b7cc9b58d6a5fdd5f33a43168245c2e1f35291f
# metric=microseconds_per_run_once (lower is better)

## cascade_bench
   cmd        : bench -n 100 -a 1 -w 100
   samples    : 375   (us per run_once, lower=better)
   min        : 100
   median(p50): 106
   p95        : 115
   p99        : 122
   max        : 126
   mean       : 106.33
   stddev     : 5.31

## cascade_chain
   cmd        : bench_cascade -n 100
   samples    : 375   (us per run_once, lower=better)
   min        : 188
   median(p50): 195
   p95        : 218
   p99        : 283
   max        : 822
   mean       : 200.62
   stddev     : 40.28
